actions.value: To learn more about switching devices and how exactly your Edge account is secured, backed-up, and how it can be restored, I recommend a quick read through this article: Getting a new phone

To learn more about switching devices and how exactly your Edge account is secured, backed-up, and how it can be restored, I recommend a quick read through this article: Getting a new phone (https://support.edge.app/hc/en-us/articles/24469866252443-Getting-a-new-phone)
